name: tree-sitter-proto
description: tree-sitter grammar for protobuf — ABI 14 build from coder3101/tree-sitter-proto latest grammar.js, compatible with tree-sitter 0.25
_vendoredBy: avmatrix — build deps (node-addon-api, node-gyp-build) are hoisted into avmatrix/package.json optionalDependencies, and native compilation is performed by avmatrix/scripts/build-tree-sitter-proto.cjs at avmatrix postinstall. Do NOT re-add a dependencies block or an install script here — doing so reintroduces https://github.com/tamnguyendinh/avmatrix/issues/836 (ENOTEMPTY on global upgrade).
